name: Goldblatt + Singer
positioning_claim: A long-established St. Louis personal injury firm that draws on 77 years of local heritage and a claim of former insurance-defense experience to signal deep courtroom credibility and trial readiness.

name: Cantor
positioning_claim: A founder-personality injury firm built around Mark Cantor as a dependable local advocate, emphasizing accessibility and a strong local presence over national scale.

name: Simon Law
positioning_claim: A celebrity-attorney trial firm led by a nationally recognized litigator, emphasizing a massive verdict record, academic credentials, and relentless trial preparation as proof of elite legal capability.

name: Schultz & Myers
positioning_claim: An aggressive personal injury firm with particular depth in tractor-trailer and trucking cases, positioning itself through a combative guerilla voice and a two-named-partner identity built on results.

name: Cofman Townsley
positioning_claim: A family-oriented personal injury firm that leads with warmth, long-standing community roots, and client testimonials, positioning itself as approachable and personally invested in every case.

name: Bruning
positioning_claim: A multigenerational family law firm that blends community roots with a modern client-first philosophy, using an all-SLU Law attorney roster and family continuity as signals of integrity and commitment.

name: Brown & Crouppen
positioning_claim: A high-volume St. Louis institution that leads with decades of television presence and over a billion dollars recovered, positioning itself as the dependable, well-resourced firm that St. Louis has trusted for generations.

name: Morgan & Morgan
positioning_claim: A national volume firm that positions itself as the largest and most accessible injury practice in America, emphasizing scale, availability, and a populist for-the-people mission as its primary identity.

name: OnderLaw
positioning_claim: A nationally focused mass tort specialist that positions itself through award recognition and a track record in large-scale pharmaceutical, product liability, and environmental litigation.

name: DM Law
positioning_claim: A founder-led personal injury practice serving Missouri markets with a conventional, settlement-oriented approach, positioning through founder credibility and straightforward client service rather than trial-specific credentials.
